question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 8, 5am ET?
rule_text: This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down". The resolution source for this market is Binance BTC/USDT 1H candle data.
